title: Career Paths of Sports Graduates 2018-2019
description: This dataset consists of texts on the career paths of Finnish people who graduated with a Bachelor's or Master's degree in Sports Studies (university of applied sciences) or a Master's degree in Sport Sciences between 2004 and 2015. The dataset contains 61 texts, including seven texts that were collected during pilot testing. The texts were collected using FSD's Penna data collection tool. In the writing guidelines, the participants were asked to discuss their education and career as well as any
license: In accordance with the agreement between FSD and the depositor.
